hero.subtitle: Science-backed biological & organic agricultural solutions that enhance crop productivity, improve soil health, and empower every farmer with sustainable technology.

common.message_received: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

common_values.foliar_spray_3_5ml_l_water_repeat_every_: Foliar spray: 3-5ml/L water. Repeat every 7-10 days.
common_values.foliar_spray_2g_l_water_at_early_larval_: Foliar spray: 2g/L water at early larval stage.
common_values.apply_5kg_acre_before_sowing_mix_with_or: Apply 5kg/acre before sowing. Mix with organic manure for best results.

bio_insecticides.name: Bio Insecticides
bio_insecticides.desc: Advanced biological insecticides and fungicides for eco-friendly pest and disease management.

bio_pesticides.name: Bio Pesticides
bio_pesticides.desc: Eco-friendly pest management solutions derived from natural organisms and botanical extracts.

biostimulants.name: Biostimulants
biostimulants.desc: Natural plant growth simulators and rhizosphere activators derived from organic sources for superior crop performance.

organic_nutrients.name: Organic Nutrients
organic_nutrients.desc: OMRI-certified organic nutrient solutions for sustainable agriculture and premium produce.

specialty_products.name: Specialty Products
specialty_products.desc: Innovative solutions for specific agricultural challenges — soil health, water management, and post-harvest.

micronutrients.name: Micronutrients
micronutrients.desc: Balanced mixture of essential micronutrients (Fe, Mn, Zn, Cu, B) for optimal plant health and high yields.

bio_fertilizers.name: Bio Fertilizers
bio_fertilizers.desc: High-potency microbial formulations for natural nitrogen fixation, phosphate solubilization, and potash mobilization.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: 60+ innovative biological and organic agricultural solutions across 5 categories.

bf-001.name: AT ORGO NB
bf-001.description: High-potency Nitrogen Fixing Bacteria (Azotobacter spp.) that provides atmospheric nitrogen directly to plants. Also available with Acetobacter spp., Azospirillum spp. and Rhizobium spp.

bf-002.name: AT ORGO PB
bf-002.description: Contains Bacillus megaterium which solubilizes insoluble phosphate in the soil and makes it available to the plant.

bf-003.name: AT ORGO KB
bf-003.description: Contains Frateuria aurena which mobilizes potash from the soil and provides it to the plant, improving fruit quality and stress resistance.

bf-004.name: AT ORGO ZB
bf-004.description: Contains Pseudomonas Spp. which solubilizes zinc from the soil and makes it available to the plant, correcting zinc deficiency.

bf-005.name: AT ORGO MYCOROOT E (VAM)
bf-005.description: A symbiotic fungus that colonizes the root system, helping in nutrient transfer (especially phosphorus) and improving water absorption.

bf-006.name: AT ORGO PRO MAX
bf-006.description: A powerful combination of Nitrogen Fixing (Azotobacter), Phosphate Solubilizing, and Potash Mobilizing bacteria for complete nutrition.

bf-007.name: AT ORGO ROBUSTA PRO-LDC KIT
bf-007.tagline: Nutritional Kit for Long Duration Crops
bf-007.description: A comprehensive nutritional kit designed for long duration crops, containing a balanced mix of NB, PB, KB, ZB, and Mycorrhiza.

bf-008.name: AT ORGO ROBUSTA PRO-SDC KIT
bf-008.tagline: Nutritional Kit for Short Duration Crops
bf-008.description: Specially formulated for short duration crops to ensure rapid growth and high productivity within a shorter crop cycle.

bf-009.name: AT ORGO ROBUSTA PRO-AC KIT
bf-009.tagline: Universal Nutritional Kit for All Crops
bf-009.description: A versatile kit providing essential NP, PK, ZB, and Mycorrhiza for all types of agricultural and horticultural crops.

bf-010.name: AT ORGO ROBUSTA PRO-NC KIT
bf-010.description: 100% water soluble carrier based nutritional kit containing Orgo Pro Max and Mycorrhiza for easy application and rapid absorption.

bf-011.name: AT ORGO SHIELDER PRO
bf-011.description: Premium Pseudomonas Spp. formulation with high cell count for effective zinc solubilization and plant defense.

bf-012.name: AT ORGO RESCUE PRO
bf-012.description: High-performance Bacillus Spp. that rapidly solubilizes phosphate, helping crops recover from stress and nutrient deficiency.

company.about_us_p1: At Jay Agritech Pvt. Ltd., we deliver innovative, sustainable, and high-quality agricultural solutions for modern farming.
company.about_us_p2: Our promoters bring 45–50 years of experience in the chemical and allied industries — backed by deep technical knowledge, strong ethics, and a culture of quality, innovation, and reliability.
company.about_us_p3: Our dynamic young team, with 15–30 years of hands-on expertise, continuously develops effective agricultural inputs that meet the evolving needs of farmers, distributors, and partners.
company.about_us_p4: Our strength: combining technical expertise, operational excellence, and market understanding to drive sustainable agriculture and long-term growth.
company.about_us_beliefs_title: At Jay Agritech, we believe in:
company.about_us_closing: With a vision to become a trusted name in agriculture, we expand our capabilities while staying committed to excellence and value creation for all stakeholders.
company.vision: To become a trusted name in the agriculture industry — expanding capabilities while maintaining commitment to excellence and value creation for all stakeholders.
company.mission: To become a trusted partner in modern agriculture by providing scientifically advanced, high-quality bio-agriculture and chemical solutions that create value for farmers, strengthen sustainability, and contribute to global food security.

leadership.subtitle: Meet the minds behind our mission.

jayesh_patel.name: Jayesh Patel
jayesh_patel.bio: A visionary entrepreneur with deep roots in Gujarat's agricultural community. Jayesh founded Jay Agritech with a mission to bridge the gap between advanced biotechnology and practical farming solutions.

priya_sharma.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
priya_sharma.bio: PhD in Agricultural Microbiology from IARI. Over 12 years of experience in developing biological crop protection and nutrition products.

rajesh_mehta.name: Rajesh Mehta
rajesh_mehta.bio: MBA with 15 years of experience in agri-input supply chain management. Expert in building efficient distribution networks across rural India.

anil_kumar.name: Dr. Anil Kumar
anil_kumar.bio: MSc in Biochemistry. Specialist in quality control protocols for biological products. Ensures every batch meets the highest standards.

q1_2026.title: Company Founded
q1_2026.description: Jay Agritech Pvt. Ltd. established in Valsad, Gujarat with a vision to revolutionize Indian agriculture.

q2_2026.title: R&D Lab Setup
q2_2026.description: State-of-the-art microbiology and formulation laboratory established with advanced testing equipment.

q3_2026.title: First Product Launch
q3_2026.description: Launch of initial product line — 15 bio-fertilizer and bio-pesticide formulations.

q4_2026.title: Dealer Network
q4_2026.description: Established partnerships with 100+ dealers across Gujarat and Maharashtra.

home.about_h2: Pioneering Sustainable Agriculture from Gujarat to All of India
home.about_lead: Founded in 2026 in Valsad, Gujarat, Jay Agritech Pvt. Ltd. is on a mission to revolutionize Indian agriculture through innovative biological solutions.
home.about_p1: We combine cutting-edge microbial technology with deep agricultural expertise to create products that work — for the farmer, for the crop, and for the environment.
home.solutions_subtitle: From soil to harvest — integrated biological solutions for every stage of crop growth
home.why_subtitle: What sets us apart in the world of agricultural innovation
home.growth_p1: Our integrated 4-step approach to transforming agriculture — combining soil science, biological nutrition, eco-safe protection, and growth optimization into one cohesive system.
home.success_subtitle: See how Jay Agritech products are making a measurable difference across Indian farms
home.knowledge_subtitle: Expert articles, guides, and seasonal advisories for modern farmers
home.partner_h2: Grow Your Business with Jay Agritech
home.partner_p1: Join our expanding network of dealers, distributors, and export partners. Access premium products, marketing support, and competitive margins.

footer.cta_desc: Join 500+ partners growing with Jay Agritech's innovative biological solutions.

solutions.title: Crop Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Comprehensive biological solutions for every stage of crop growth — from soil preparation to harvest.

business.title: Business Solutions
business.subtitle: Partner with Jay Agritech for contract manufacturing, white-label solutions, research collaborations, and global expansion.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our products, partnerships, or services? We'd love to hear from you.

blog.title: Knowledge Hub
blog.subtitle: Expert articles, guides, and seasonal advisories to help you make informed farming decisions.

partners.title: Become a Partner
partners.subtitle: Join India's fastest-growing agri-biotech network. We're looking for passionate partners to help us deliver sustainable solutions to every corner of the country.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join us in our mission to innovate agriculture and nurture growth across India.

soil_health.title: Soil Health Management
soil_health.desc: Healthy soil is the foundation of productive agriculture. Our microbial solutions restore and maintain soil vitality by rebuilding beneficial microbial communities, improving soil structure, and enhancing nutrient availability naturally.

nutrient_management.title: Nutrient Management
nutrient_management.desc: Balanced nutrition is key to optimal crop performance. Our bio-fertilizers and organic nutrient solutions provide plants with essential macro and micro-nutrients through natural biological pathways, reducing chemical dependency.

pest_disease.title: Pest & Disease Control
pest_disease.desc: Protect your crops with eco-friendly biological pest management. Our bio-insecticides and bio-fungicides provide effective protection against a wide range of pests and diseases without harmful chemical residues.

growth_enhancement.title: Growth Enhancement
growth_enhancement.desc: Maximize your crop's genetic potential with our range of biostimulants and growth promoters. From flowering induction to fruit quality improvement, our products boost yield and quality naturally.

contract_manufacturing.title: Contract Manufacturing
contract_manufacturing.description: Custom formulation and manufacturing services for agri-input companies.

research_formulations.title: Research & Formulations
research_formulations.description: Collaborative R&D services for new agricultural formulations.

white_label.title: White / Private Label
white_label.description: Launch ready-made agricultural products under your own brand.

exports_franchise.title: Exports & Franchise
exports_franchise.description: Export and franchise partnerships for international expansion.

contact.description: Whether you need product information, want to explore partnership opportunities, or have technical queries — our team is here to help.

growth_system.title: The Jay Agritech Growth System™
growth_system.subtitle: Our integrated 4-step approach combines soil science, biological nutrition, eco-safe protection, and growth optimization into one cohesive system for maximum crop performance.

soil.title: Soil Foundation
soil.subtitle: Rebuild & Restore Soil Health
soil.desc: Healthy soil is the cornerstone of productive farming. Our soil foundation products rebuild beneficial microbial communities, improve soil structure, enhance water retention, and restore natural fertility — creating the perfect base for vigorous crop growth.

nutrition.title: Bio Nutrition
nutrition.subtitle: Natural Nutrient Delivery Systems
nutrition.desc: Move beyond chemical dependency with our biological nutrient management solutions. Our bio-fertilizers fix atmospheric nitrogen, solubilize phosphorus, and mobilize potassium through natural microbial pathways — delivering balanced nutrition exactly when crops need it.

protection.title: Eco Protection
protection.subtitle: Biological Pest & Disease Control
protection.desc: Protect your crops without harming the environment. Our bio-pesticides and bio-fungicides use naturally occurring organisms and botanical extracts to control pests and diseases effectively — leaving zero harmful residues on produce.

growth.title: Growth Boost
growth.subtitle: Maximize Yield & Quality
growth.desc: Unlock your crop's full genetic potential with our premium biostimulants and growth enhancers. From inducing heavy flowering to increasing fruit size, weight, and sweetness — our products deliver measurable improvements in both yield and produce quality.

growth_system.cta_desc: Experience the complete Jay Agritech Growth System on your farm. Our agronomists will help you implement the right products for your specific crops and conditions.

dealer.title: Become a Dealer
dealer.desc: Perfect for local retail shops looking to provide high-quality biological inputs to their farming community.

distributor.title: Become a Distributor
distributor.desc: Scale your business by managing regional distribution networks and supplying to multiple retail outlets.

export.title: Export Partner
export.desc: Join us in taking sustainable Indian agri-technology to global markets. We support international expansion.

market.title: Growing Market
market.desc: Tap into the booming 25%+ annual growth of the Indian biological agri-input market.

quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.desc: CIB-RC and FCO approved products with field-proven results and consistent potency.

support.title: Unmatched Support
support.desc: Get direct access to our scientists and field experts for technical and sales support.

brand.title: Trusted Brand
brand.desc: Leverage our growing scientific credibility and farmer trust to boost your local business.

mission_driven.title: Mission-Driven
mission_driven.desc: Be part of a company that is solving critical agricultural challenges for India's farmers.

growth.title: Professional Growth
growth.desc: Expand your skills in a fast-paced environment with mentorship from industry experts.

culture.title: Inclusive Culture
culture.desc: A collaborative workplace where every voice matters and scientific curiosity is celebrated.

impact.title: Real-World Impact
impact.desc: See the direct results of your work in the fields and the lives of the farming community.

field_sales.title: Technical Sales Officer
field_sales.description: Drive product adoption by conducting field demonstrations and building strong dealer-farmer networks.

research_microbiologist.title: Junior Research Microbiologist
research_microbiologist.description: Focus on strain isolation, fermentation optimization, and new formulation development in our advanced lab.

digital_marketing.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
digital_marketing.description: Enhance our digital presence through social media management, SEO, and farmer engagement campaigns.

qa_analyst.title: Quality Control Analyst
qa_analyst.description: Ensure every batch of our biological inputs meets the highest standards of potency and purity.

careers.no_role_text: Don't see a role that fits? We're always looking for talented individuals.
